title: Infinite loop when generate for condition is >= 0

features.name: generate for loop with unsigned genvar and >= 0 condition
features.description: Code should include a generate for loop using a genvar variable with a condition comparing to 0 using >= operator, where the loop decrements the variable

features.name: genvar decrement wraps to large unsigned value
features.description: Code should include a genvar variable that decrements past 0, causing unsigned wraparound behavior in a generate for loop
features.snippet:
genvar i;
for (i = 0; i >= 0; i = i-1);
